Accounting.profit_loss_desc: Analyze your revenue, expenses, and net income over a specific period.
Accounting.balance_sheet_desc: View your assets, liabilities, and equity at a specific point in time.

Accounting.financial_trends_desc: Revenue vs Expenses for the last 6 months

Accounting.error_not_balanced: Journal entry must be balanced (Total Debit = Total Credit)
Accounting.error_min_lines: At least two lines with accounts and amounts are required

purpose_descriptions.ACCOUNTS_RECEIVABLE: Tracks money owed to the business by customers for goods or services sold on credit.
purpose_descriptions.ACCOUNTS_PAYABLE: Tracks money owed by the business to suppliers or vendors for goods or services purchased on credit.
purpose_descriptions.GOODS_RECEIVED_NOT_INVOICED: Liability account for goods received but not yet invoiced by the vendor.
purpose_descriptions.INVENTORY_ASSET: Tracks the value of goods held for sale or materials used in production.
purpose_descriptions.COGS: Tracks the direct costs attributable to the production of the goods sold in a company.
purpose_descriptions.SALES_REVENUE: The default income account for recording revenue from sales of products or services.
purpose_descriptions.SALES_DISCOUNT: Tracks discounts given to customers, reducing the total sales revenue.
purpose_descriptions.SALES_TAX_PAYABLE: Tracks sales tax collected from customers that needs to be remitted to the tax authority.
purpose_descriptions.PURCHASE_TAX_RECEIVABLE: Tracks tax paid on purchases that can be claimed back or offset against sales tax payable.
purpose_descriptions.CASH_ON_HAND: Represents physical cash kept at the business location (e.g., petty cash, cash register).
purpose_descriptions.BANK: The primary bank account used for business transactions.
purpose_descriptions.OPENING_BALANCE_EQUITY: Used to record opening balances when setting up accounts to ensure the balance sheet balances.
purpose_descriptions.RETAINED_EARNINGS: Tracks the cumulative net earnings or profits of the business that have not been distributed to owners.
purpose_descriptions.UNCATEGORIZED_EXPENSE: A holding account for expenses that haven't been assigned a specific category yet.
purpose_descriptions.UNCATEGORIZED_INCOME: A holding account for income that hasn't been assigned a specific category yet.
purpose_descriptions.UNCATEGORIZED_ASSET: A holding account for assets that haven't been assigned a specific category yet.
purpose_descriptions.EXCHANGE_GAIN_LOSS: Tracks gains or losses resulting from fluctuations in exchange rates for foreign currency transactions.
purpose_descriptions.WIP_INVENTORY: Tracks the value of materials consumed in production that have not yet been converted to finished goods.
purpose_descriptions.PRODUCTION_OVERHEAD: Tracks overhead costs allocated to production (e.g., factory utilities, indirect labor).

Admin.tenant_details: Make changes to the tenant details here.
Admin.create_new_tenant: Add a new tenant to the system.
Admin.cannot_deactivate_default: You cannot deactivate the default tenant.
Admin.user_profile_changes: Make changes to the user profile here.
Admin.add_new_user: Add a new user to the system.
Admin.delete_user_desc: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the user account and remove their data from our servers.
Admin.select_permissions_desc: Select the permissions you want to assign to this role.
Admin.manage_company_details: Manage your company details and configuration.
Admin.company_not_found: Company profile not found. Please contact support.
Admin.outbox_tip: Tip: Use “Unlock” for stuck PROCESSING, and “Mark DEAD” for poison messages.
Admin.no_failed_errors: No failed error groups for the current filter.
Admin.requeue_desc: This will reset the event for processing and clear its error and lock state.
Admin.unlock_desc: This will clear the lock and make it retryable again (sets status to FAILED).
Admin.move_dead_desc: This marks the event as DEAD and prevents automatic retries until you requeue it.
Admin.bulk_unlock_stuck_desc: This will unlock stale PROCESSING events (older than lock timeout) and set them to FAILED, so they can be retried.
Admin.bulk_requeue_desc: This will reset matching events to PENDING and clear error/lock state. Use with care in production.
Admin.bulk_requeue_error_desc: This will reset matching events to PENDING and clear error/lock state. This action uses exact error matching.
Admin.bulk_dead_error_desc: This will move matching FAILED events to DEAD. This action uses exact error matching.
Admin.configure_ai_provider: Configure the AI provider and API key
Admin.enable_ai_desc: Turn on/off the AI features globally.
Admin.api_key_desc: Leave blank to use the environment variable default.
Admin.temperature_desc: Controls randomness: 0 is deterministic, 1 is creative.
